category_title: Severely disaffected learners with mental health issues and writing barriers
scenario_title: Struggling with manual writing and corrections in coursework
minimal_context: The student is working on a qualification coursework assignment in their workbook during a one-to-one support session.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please open your workbook and start writing the answers for the next section of your qualification coursework assignment.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Arrives looking upset) I don't want to do this today. Writing is always a massive barrier for me.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Just try to get as much written down as you can.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Writes a few sentences and stops) I've messed it up already. It's full of mistakes and crossed-out words.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Since there are mistakes, you need to copy it again on the next page so it's readable.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I'm not copying it again! I have lots of writing to do and it's already full of mistakes. It's just too disheartening to copy it all over again.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Please open your workbook and start writing the answers for the next section of your qualification coursework assignment.

STUDENT: (Arrives looking upset) I don't want to do this today. Writing is always a massive barrier for me.

TUTOR: Just try to get as much written down as you can.

STUDENT: (Writes a few sentences and stops) I've messed it up already. It's full of mistakes and crossed-out words.

TUTOR: Since there are mistakes, you need to copy it again on the next page so it's readable.

STUDENT: I'm not copying it again! I have lots of writing to do and it's already full of mistakes. It's just too disheartening to copy it all over again.

task.content: Completing qualification course work assignments and writing elements of a course

context.materials: Qualification course work materials, laptops, computers, work books, portfolio

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When they have lots of writing to do and it is full of mistakes, and they have to copy it again
related_quotes: If they have lots of writing to do and it is full of mistakes, it is very disheartening for them to copy it again.

behavior_patterns.internal_state: Not confident with written examinations, feeling pressure
